CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD Technical Outlook: Retracing to Critical MA20 Amid CEO Shifts at Zodia Markets
tldr_points: BTC/USD trading at critical MA20 resistance level after 8% weekly decline
Zodia Markets CEO departure amplifies volatility amid crypto sector uncertainty
RSI(14) signals bullish divergence despite breakdown below 20-period MA
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD faces pivotal MA20 test as Zodia CEO exodus triggers sector-wide downturn. RSI divergence suggests potential reversal despite bearish momentum.
CRYPTO.comment: Exhausted accumulation suggests consolidation phase ahead of nonlinear move
